sqlMap.select: select * from AttorneyEnvWorkLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AttorneyEnvWorkLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey EnvAttorneyName NumberOfYrOfEnvExp PercentOfTimeDevoted LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #EnvAttorneyName# #NumberOfYrOfEnvExp# #PercentOfTimeDevoted# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('AttorneyEnvWorkLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select AttroneyEnvWorkKey, EnvAttorneyName, NumberOfYrOfEnvExp, PercentOfTimeDevoted, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyEnvWorkLW where AttroneyEnvWorkKey = #AttroneyEnvWorkKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AttorneyEnvWorkLW set
EnvAttorneyName = #EnvAttorneyName# EnvAttorneyName = null NumberOfYrOfEnvExp = #NumberOfYrOfEnvExp# NumberOfYrOfEnvExp = null PercentOfTimeDevoted = #PercentOfTimeDevoted# PercentOfTimeDevoted = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where AttroneyEnvWorkKey = #AttroneyEnvWorkKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AttorneyEnvWorkLW where AttroneyEnvWorkKey = #AttroneyEnvWorkKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AttorneyEnvWorkLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AttroneyEnvWorkKey, EnvAttorneyName, NumberOfYrOfEnvExp, PercentOfTimeDevoted, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyEnvWorkLW where AttroneyEnvWorkKey = #AttroneyEnvWorkKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select AttroneyEnvWorkKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, EnvAttorneyName, NumberOfYrOfEnvExp, PercentOfTimeDevoted, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AttorneyEnvWorkLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
